site.name: AutoExpat
site.tagline: The smart way to move to Barcelona.

hero.title: Get your Spanish NIE.
hero.subtitle: Without the headache.
hero.description: A smart, AI-assisted platform that holds your hand through the exact steps to get your EU Registry Certificate in Barcelona. Do it yourself, but never alone.
hero.subtext: Includes our exclusive "First 30 Days in BCN" survival guide.

painPoint.title: Freedom of movement doesn't mean freedom from paperwork.
painPoint.description: As an EU citizen, you have the right to live in Barcelona. But figuring out the specific requirements for the "Green NIE", the Padron, and the right taxes can still take weeks of confusing research. We fix that.

howItWorks.title: You take the steps. We hold your hand.
howItWorks.description: Our platform doesn't do the physical appointments for you, but our automated processes ensure you show up 100% prepared.

steps.title: 1. Tell us about you
steps.description: Answer a few questions about your job and housing. Our AI instantly creates a personalized, step-by-step roadmap tailored to your exact situation.

steps.title: 2. AI Form Prep
steps.description: Stop fighting with Spanish PDFs. We automatically generate and validate your official forms (EX-18, Tasa 790) so they are perfect before you print them.

steps.title: 3. Follow & Execute
steps.description: Follow our clear instructions to submit your docs. Once done, unlock your survival guide to master your first weeks in the city.

features.title: The EU Resident Kit (NIE)
items: Instructions on how to book your appointment legally.
Document checklist to ensure you are not rejected.

features.title: First 30 Days in BCN Guide
items: Banking: Which banks accept you without a NIE yet.
Housing: Tips to spot rental scams in idealista.
Connectivity: Best mobile & internet providers for expats.
Transport: How to get the T-Mobilitat card easily.
Healthcare: Next steps to get your Social Security number.

pricing.title: Clear, honest pricing.
pricing.description: Agencies charge hundreds of euros just to fill out these forms. We automated it.

card.title: EU Starter Kit
card.subtitle: Everything you need to handle your paperwork confidently.

successStories.title: 1000+ Expats already settled in BCN
successStories.subtitle: Real stories from people who moved with AutoExpat.

cases.name: Marco
cases.text: The EX-18 form generation was a lifesaver. I had my NIE in 10 days without speaking much Spanish.

cases.name: Elena
cases.text: Moving for a job was stressful, but the guide's checklist for the Padron made the appointment a breeze.

cases.name: Lars
cases.text: I was worried about healthcare. The guide explained exactly how to get my SIP card after the NIE.

cases.name: Sophie
cases.text: Finding an apartment without a NIE is hard. The 'First 30 Days' guide showed me which agencies to trust.

cases.name: Piotr
cases.text: The guide gave me the confidence to set up as an Autónomo. Clear, simple, and effective.

cases.name: Chloe
cases.text: Stayed after my masters. The transition from student to professional paperwork was handled perfectly.

cases.name: Sami
cases.text: Moving a family is complex. The guide helped us with school registrations and social security numbers.

cases.name: Marta
cases.text: I love the BCN vibe. The guide made getting my T-Mobilitat and banking sorted in the first week.

cases.name: Hans
cases.text: Opened my cafe last month. Getting the NIE was the first hurdle, and AutoExpat made it invisible.

cases.name: Isabella
cases.text: The Tasa payment instructions were so clear. I've heard horror stories, but my experience was 10/10.
